required_teams.team_description: Evacuate affected area, manage decontamination flow

inject_templates.template: Gas or unknown substance reported at {venue}. People experiencing respiratory distress. Enclosed space; ventilation limited.
Substance spreading through carriages/area. Ventilation decision needed. Evacuate or contain?
Hazmat assessment: substance unknown. Decontamination site required. Fire/Hazmat coordinating.
Decon supplies limited. Triage prioritising respiratory cases. Hospital surge expected.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when Fire/Hazmat decides evacuate vs contain and ventilate
decision_branches.inject_template: Ventilate and risk spread? Or contain and risk exposure to those inside?

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when coordination selects decontamination site location
decision_branches.inject_template: Decon site selection. Upwind? Capacity? Access for ambulances?
